title: --userns documentation markdown layout issue
body:
The itemized list in the `--userns` section changed between

in v3.2.3
https://docs.podman.io/en/v3.2.3/markdown/podman-run.1.html#userns-mode

and

in v3.3.0
https://docs.podman.io/en/v3.3.0/markdown/podman-run.1.html#userns-mode

The items __container__ and __host__ are not listed in the same way as the other items in the v3.3.0 version.

The hyphens before __container__ and __host__ were removed in this git commit
https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/100c23dc5b01b8f9730e3c39fd538f81e269484c


I would assume that  __container__ and __host__ should be listed in the itemized list just like the other items.
